My name is Sarah Whitfield. I have worked at the Brookside warehouse on 18 Commerce Drive since January 2022. On the night of November 8th, 2024, starting around 11 PM, my shift supervisor Daniel Reyes told me and three other women on the night shift that we would have to stay an extra four hours past the end of our scheduled shift to finish loading trucks. He said anyone who refused would be fired by the end of the week. He said it loudly in front of the other workers so we would all hear. He has done this at least six times since August. Two of the women I work with had to leave their children with neighbors past midnight because of these unscheduled extensions. None of the extra hours have appeared on our pay stubs. I am willing to provide copies of my pay stubs and the schedule that was posted on the breakroom door for the past three months.
